findings.title: Missing Rent sysvar for init
findings.message: Init pattern detected — verify Rent sysvar or space calculation is handled.
findings.fix_hint: Use init with space derived from INIT_SPACE and ensure rent-exempt funding.
findings.code_snippet:
37 | pub struct InitializeVault<'info> {
    38 |     #[account(
>   39 |         init,
    40 |         payer = payer,
    41 |         space = 8 + Vault::INIT_SPACE,
